meta.title: Usame Muhammed — Software Engineer
meta.description: Software Engineer · CRM Analyst · Flutter Developer · Multilingual Communication

hero.tagline: An engineer who unites software, process analysis and multilingual communication in a single discipline. I build mobile apps, design CRM workflows, and bridge Arabic – Turkish – English.

lead: . I work across mobile development, CRM configuration, workflow automation and multilingual communication. I listen to the business need, pick the right tool, and carry the solution end to end.

services.intro: Without forcing me into a single label, we can collaborate on one — or several — of these areas based on your need.

items.title: Software Development
items.body: Mobile apps with Flutter and Dart; architecture patterns, state management, Firebase and API integrations.

items.title: CRM & Process Analysis
items.body: CRM configuration, workflow automation, requirement analysis and process optimization — making operations readable and measurable.

items.title: Application Support
items.body: Technical support, incident & problem management, testing and UAT — keeping systems running without interruption.

items.title: Multilingual Communication
items.body: Arabic (native), Turkish (C2) and English. Translation, localization and multilingual customer communication.

items.description: Configuring and optimizing CRM systems aligned with business needs, managing workflows and automation processes, providing application support, conducting requirement analysis, and supporting reporting, testing and UAT processes.
Developed mobile applications with Flutter and Dart, improved code structure, integrated Firebase services and APIs, and collaborated with cross-functional teams in testing and debugging.

skills.intro: I combine a disciplined architectural mindset from mobile development with business-process design and hands-on technical support experience.
